anchor.headline: Maharashtra reported >50 lakh farmers registering under PMFBY in a recent Kharif push (press summary).
anchor.note: Division % values below are modelled desk indices (0–100) scaled to that statewide intensity and weighted by typical kharif exposure of each revenue division - not a direct government district dashboard extract. Replace with agristack / PMFBY MIS when integrated.

anchor.headline: Press coverage of PMFBY compliance reviews in multiple Maharashtra districts (data-quality / eligibility friction).
anchor.note: Division grievance index (0–100) is computed in the app as: round(0.44 × moisture stress proxy + 0.36 × (100 − scheme desk %) + 14), clamped - until Aaple Sarkar / CM Helpline open APIs are integrated.
